name: Danske Invest Mix Offensiv Plus Akk KL
summary: Danske Invest Mix Offensiv Plus Akk KL is a more aggressive mixed-asset fund. It has an even larger allocation to equities than the "Offensiv" fund, seeking higher returns but also carrying greater risk; returns are reinvested, compounding growth over time. The fund is managed by Danske Invest, targeting investors with a high risk appetite.
